name: Brendon Wang
bio: Brendon Wang is a sophomore at Lakeside School in Seattle, WA. He started programming in 3rd grade, and is currently in the USACO Platinum division. He also enjoys competitive math and has qualified for AIME 3 times. In his free time, he likes to play tennis and ultimate.

name: Zerui Li
bio: Zerui Li is a sophomore at Lakeside School in Seattle, WA. He started programming in 7th grade, and is currently in the USACO Platinum division. In his free time, he likes to grind Codeforces problems with his friends and work on CS related projects.

name: Haoran Wu
bio: Absolute beast when it comes to problem writing.
